title: A Divine Proclamation of Finishing the Present Existence on December 21st, 2012...NOT - The Movie
description:
Today is December 21, 2012 and yer world's got some weird esoteric manchilds declaring it as the apocalypse we all have been waiting for...sort of.

Anyway, I did something special again. It's explained in the description of that video on how I did the main stuff in this movie: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SUzc1AEjYbY

The intro is a 1:1 reference to a very old tv channel ident from the mid 80's.

The motion picture dividing the art mind-fuckery into two parts features an absent-minded myself constantly changing his clothes, the video quality and taking the beard on and off in a fraction of a nano second, who perhaps will have been the greatest tomato throwing bastard in 2012, if there's nobody else pushing him off the throne before 2013. The tomato - round and red for supper bread or red and round for your supper hound. The voice is from Gerd Duwner, who did the German voice of Ernie from Sesame Street and Barney Rubble from The Flintstones. He died in 1996.

Project files (for Sony Vegas 6 and After Effects CS5.5): http://www.mediafire.com/?zs4v8bjbin9n85y

Translation (it's not a one-to-one translation):

- What should I tell you?
- I just looked a bit out of the window and when I was about to close it, a real butt appeared and looked through.
- "What do you want, butt? Do you want to have supper with me?"
- The butt became happy and laughed with its wobbling buttcheeks.
- "Thanks," it said.
- "You're welcome," I said "You are a real butt and a rare one on earth"
